data.title: Soulection Radio Show #436
data.content:
Recorded while flying to Miami, Joe brings a diverse mix inspired by [Art Basel Miami Beach 2019](https://www.artbasel.com/stories/highlights-video-art-basel-miami-beach-2019).

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #434 (Sango & Xavier Omär Radio)
data.content: [Sango](https://sangobeats.com/home) and [Xaiver Omär](https://www.xavieromar.com/) take over  Soulection Radio to perform music from [#MomentsSpentLovingYou](https://music.apple.com/us/album/moments-spent-loving-you/1484140449?at=1010lMz4) & Sango drops an exclusive mix.

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #433
data.content:
2-hour journey through music handpicked by Joe Kay.

<!--more-->

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #432
data.content:
Joe showcases music from emerging artists like [Jayla Darden](/artists/jayla-darden/), [Durand Jones](/artists/durand-jones-the-indications), [Reon Vangèr](/artists/reon-vang-r) and more.

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #431
data.content:
Joe is back home in Los Angeles after a 3-week journey with new music from [XaverOmar & Sango](/artists/xavier-om-r-sango/), [Frank Ocean](/artists/sango-x-frank-ocean/) and [D Smoke](/artists/d-smoke/).

<!--more-->

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #430 w/The Engine
data.content:
Nigerian artist [The Engine](https://twitter.com/odunsitheengine) joins Joe for an in-depth interview.

<!--more-->

Follow The Engine on [Apple Music](https://itunes.apple.com/us/artist/odunsi-the-engine/id1076709896?at=1010lMz4), [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/3QAWvRmq1TMLuNtDKVyRaW), [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/odunsi), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/odunsitheengine/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/odunsitheengine).

data.title: Soulection Radio Show #429
data.content:
Joe showcases the diverse sounds he discovered on his trek from South Africa to London.
